description: A young female adventurer at the very start of her journey, before she has found any gear, weapons or armor — this is the bare starting character, exactly how she looks before any equipment is picked up. Confident, fearless and genuinely badass with a cool rebellious edge, a tough determined expression, sharp intense eyes, windswept dark brown hair, and a lean athletic build. Her stance is relaxed but ready and self-assured. She wears ONLY plain, simple, unremarkable starting clothes in muted natural colors — a plain worn shirt or tunic and simple trousers with basic boots — strictly in browns, blacks, greys and off-white, nothing colorful. She has NO gear of any kind: no armor, no jacket, no shoulder guard, no cloak, no utility belt, no gloves, no weapon, no sword, no dagger, no bags or pouches — completely unequipped. Not sexualized, not cute, not a princess, not a dress. She must still look cool, memorable, capable and badass through her face, hair and posture alone. High-quality RPG pixel-art character, clean readable silhouette, strong shape language, expressive face, restrained muted earth-tone palette, full-body character, single centered figure, transparent background.
